jobs.prompt: High quality logo on a pure plain white background, centered, clean, no watermark, no signature. Design an ORIGINAL full royal heraldic achievement (coat of arms) for a sport shooting club: a central shield with a red and white lozenge (diamond) pattern, a princely crown on top, an ermine mantle drapery, two laurel branches, a ribbon banner reading LA DETENTE. On the shield add a glossy red heart and crossed AR-15 and ball-trap shotgun, an orange clay pigeon above. Elegant, gold and red, regal. Original artwork.
